demo.title: Show me the meme
demo.code:
show me the meme

-> matches link-library.json by name, posts the caption
   + the entry's xPost link as plain text; X unfurls the media.

setup: Charge a 300 $BNKR fee (≈$0.10, clears BNKR's $0.05 transfer minimum — 0.01 is too small to send) to the ops wallet 0xE2a4A8b9d77080c57799A94BA8eDeb2Dd6e0aC10 FIRST — this on-chain transfer is the TRIGGER and accrues BNKR points. Founder self-tests route here — charging your OWN wallet → the BNKR wallet breaks the transfer; ops is the clean dest. For real requesters this can later point at the BNKR wallet so BNKR earns its cut/points.
Fees are never charged in Money for Trees; this fee is $BNKR only
Trigger: a user on X asks to see/hear a library item (song or meme)
Delivery is a PLAIN-TEXT reply with the entry's xPost link — X unfurls it. No media upload, no X API credentials.
